1100.expedition: I went and claimed the commission rewards for you. Just don't forget about them.
1100.head: linghangyuan31_1
1100.home: Well fought, Commander. You must be tired. Allow me to give you a shoulder massage.
1100.huodong: Heehee. It seems there's an important event happening now. I'm sure you haven't forgotten, but I thought I'd remind you, just in case.
1100.login: Welcome back, Commander. I cleaned the house and made you dinner. As for entertainment tonight... Ah, why don't we watch that new drama on TV?
1100.mail: Hmm. Looks like you have a new letter. Do remember to open it.
1100.main: Haven't you been feeling rather worn out lately? Don't be afraid to rely on me for help.|I had our amusement park photos printed. Do you want me to put them up on the wall? 2000.chime_0: It's 12 AM, dweeb. Why are you still up? You want me to take a picture of you yawning like a goofball or what? My advice: Go to bed already♪
2000.chime_1: It's 1 AM. Wait, you're still awake? You haven't finished work and now you're crunching or something? You poor, helpless little thing. I'll stick around just for you.
2000.chime_10: It's 10 AM. You should do some exercise for a change of pace. You don't wanna pass out out of nowhere, do you?
2000.chime_11: It's 11 AM. Want me to read your report out for you? It's fine, I already know your dweeb ass can't do anything without me♪
2000.chime_12: It's 12 PM. Hey, dweebie! Have you still not had lunch yet? At least TRY to maintain a work-life balance. How am I supposed to order you around if you end up bedridden, huh? Seriously!
2000.chime_13: It's 1 PM. Don'tcha think it's time for, like, a nap? Your work can wait, but my permission for you to rest doesn't come easily! You should take my advice!
2000.chime_14: It's 2 PM. *yawn*... I'm tired. Maybe I'll rest on your shoulder... Heheh – you didn't get any creepy ideas just now, did you, dweeb?
2000.chime_15: It's 3 PM. Time for tea, don'tcha think? Go and get some snacks! Getting a little sugar in your system should make even your dweeb brain work a little faster!
2000.chime_16: It's 4 PM. I just organized the tasks left over from yesterday. Where's my reward, huh?
2000.chime_17: It's 5 PM. So, how's your progress? Almost done? You're not gonna work overtime and make me stay behind AGAIN, are you? Well, even if you do, I guess it's fine.
2000.chime_18: It's 6 PM. Time for dinner! I'm not exactly a fan of babysitting you, but I would be annoyed if you starved to death, so... y'know!
2000.chime_19: It's 7 PM. Dweeb, you're not actually gonna pull a solo all-nighter, are you? I feel bad for you! So bad that I'll stick around if you ask for it!
2000.chime_2: It's 2 AM. Still not going to bed? Whatever, I'm bored anyway, so I'll hang out with you for a while.
2000.chime_20: It's 8 PM. Hey, dweeb, check it out! I found a typo. Heehee. I already fixed it. Talk about embarrassing, right?
2000.chime_21: It's 9 PM. I can't believe you're still doing paperwork this late... Fine. There's tea over there! I made too much of it, that's all. Don't go jumping to conclusions, you hear?
2000.chime_22: It's 10 PM. Man, the fact that you're still working... How about I show you something to wake you up? Like these photos of you yawning I took from all kinds of angles!
2000.chime_23: It's 11 PM. Shouldn't you be going to sleep? Are you STILL gonna keep working? Not on my watch! Go to bed right now!
2000.chime_3: It's 3 AM. Tsk, you really are helpless. I'll get you some coffee. Don't worry, this one time I won't mix in anything questionable!
2000.chime_4: It's 4 AM. Hey! It's morning, if you didn't know! Don't blame me if you pass out from pulling one all-nighter too many! ...I'm kidding. Here's a drink to energize you!
2000.chime_5: It's 5 AM. Good niiight! Wait, I mean good morniiing! Remember to get plenty of sleep to stay healthy! ...What are you staring at me for? Dweebo!
2000.chime_6: It's 6 AM! Are you getting to work THIS early in the morning? You're still yawning. I bet you didn't even get enough sleep. That's just sad!
2000.chime_7: It's 7 AM. Hm? What're those reports you've got there? Unfinished ones from yesterday? Or are they all new? Sheesh... That's crazy.
2000.chime_8: It's 8 AM. Time to get to work, huh? Well, good luck with that, dweeb! If you say, "I need your help" here and now, I might just consider it♪
2000.chime_9: It's 9 AM. Commander? Dweeb? Ugh, you're blanking out again. You weren't thinking about getting up to some funny business with me, were you?
2000.chuxi: Really? You have to stay up on New Year's Eve, so no going to bed early? Fine, I'll be generous and stay with you. But if you fall asleep before me, be ready to face the consequences!
2000.expedition: A commission ought to be done by now. Aren't my time-management skills just impeccable?
2000.genghuan: This is your kink, huh? You're a dweeb alright...
2000.head: lingyangzhe32_3
2000.home: Aww, tired already? You really are worthless, Commander. Okay, since you're doing so bad, I'll be nice and put on some tea for you.
2000.huodong: Something big is going to happen. My gut's telling me so!
2000.login: Heheh! About time you showed up, dweeb! You're SO getting it for making me wait all this time!

2000.main: Hey, Commander, you blanking out again? Can't do anything without me? Pull yourself together!|Oh, you feeling all serious today? Okay, but you're still totally incapable compared to me. 2202.xinnian: To think I'd run into you on New Year's Day! Guess it falls on me to babysit you. Here, for you – a New Year's gift and a photo album of all the times you messed up. Took me a whole month to sort through them! Do you want my autograph to go with that?
2202.zhongqiu: Where's the wasabi paste – in the crust, or in the filling? Come on, try out my original mooncake!

2300.chuxi: It's almost New Year's. You got any wishes? Me? Obviously, I'm hoping your dweeb ass gets stronger. 'Cause if you don't, I'm gonna have to coddle you for all eternity, aren't I?
2300.expedition: Remember to go and greet the commission team. My hands are tied, so yeah♪
2300.head: lingyangzhe3_2
2300.home: Oh, you were peeking on me, huh? God, you're such a perv♥
2300.huodong: Something's gonna happen? Hmm... I'd better dry off and get ready to move.
2300.login: Well, well, the dweeb has finally showed up. You're a horrible person, walking in on a girl while she's bathing♥ So, are you gonna do something or just stand there?
2300.mail: If you wanna read your mail, go do it in the corner. Otherwise, I'll nab it and read it myself.
2300.main: Do... Do you HAVE to stare so hard? I know I'm irresistibly cute, but I'm gonna start charging you by the second if you keep gawking.|Hey, Commander! Don't you wanna come closer? You've got a golden opportunity here!|What are you looking at, dweeb? Are you enraptured? Heheh, well, it just so happens the water's nice and warm right now.
2300.mission: You still have unfinished missions, remember? I get it, I get it, you just can't do anything without me.
2300.mission_complete: Mission complete. Hey, dweebmaster, could you help me scrub myself? Heh, just kidding♪ That's a reward you've yet to earn, see.
2300.name: Navi
2300.qingrenjie: Commander, did you know there are some crazy ways to eat Valentine's chocolate? Want me to show you?
2300.shengdan: Merry Christmas! Heheh! Did you bring a Christmas tree toy you can plop down in the tub?
2300.touch: Y'know, Commander, you're doing something that no decent person ever would.
2300.wansheng: Gimme your treats, now! Or I'll pull you with me into the tub! ...Ahaha! You're making a face like you'd like that! What a creep!
2300.xinnian: Happy New Year. My little dweeb, what kind of present do you want? ...Wooow, thought of something, did you? You've got that feisty look in your eyes.
2300.zhongqiu: I got some Mid-Autumn Festival mooncakes. You want some? ...I should take the first bite? Ohh, I get it. You're saying you want an indirect kiss from me, huh?

3000.chime_0: It's 12 AM... Guardian, if you stay up any longer, you'll have no energy all throughout tomorrow... Can I go to bed with you?
3000.chime_1: It's 1 AM... I never knew it was this quiet at night... Wait, are you still awake? Please give me a minute and I'll make some hot milk for you.
3000.chime_10: It's 10 AM... You've been toiling for a while now, so why not take a break? Allow me to give you a shoulder massage.
3000.chime_11: It's 11 AM... I see you're completely in work mode by now. I feel a little lonely... N-no, I can't be like that – I need to do what I can to help you...
3000.chime_12: It's 12 PM... Remember to eat your lunch while it's still warm. I, um... I hope you like the packed lunch I made for you...
3000.chime_13: It's 1 PM... Bweh... The text on this report is starting to spin... Guardian, could we please take a nap together? Zzz...
3000.chime_14: It's 2 PM... *yawn*... Oops! Yawning is contagious! I-I'll just go open the window to let some fresh air in so my drowsiness won't affect you!
3000.chime_15: It's 3 PM... There's a while to go until the next mission, so we have time to enjoy some afternoon tea. How many sugar cubes would you like in your tea, guardian?
3000.chime_16: It's 4 PM... A-are your eyes starting to get dry? Then allow me to give you some eyedrops! Ugh... I'm nervous, and it's making my hand tremble...
3000.chime_17: It's 5 PM... The sky is starting to turn a gentle orange color. It might get a little chilly when night comes around... b-but I'll be fine as long as you h-hold me in your arms!
3000.chime_18: It's 6 PM... When we have dinner... can I skip the broccoli and bell peppers? N-no? Aww... Okay, I'll try to eat them anyway...
3000.chime_19: It's 7 PM... I had dinner and now I'm starting to get sleepy. I'd love to fall asleep while you hug me...
3000.chime_2: It's 2 AM... Ah... Gosh, the ball rang again, and you're still not sleeping? ...Oh, I must've closed my eyes and dozed off next to you at some point...
3000.chime_20: It's 8 PM... "I wish I could curl up into a tiny ball and hide behind the second button on your coat, where only the sun shines brightly..." Eep! Um, I was just taking notes of today's events!
3000.chime_21: It's 9 PM... We might actually see some shooting stars tonight. Does making a wish to a shooting star really work? I'd love to try it... Will you make a wish related to me, my guardian?
3000.chime_22: It's 10 PM... Guardian, if you have time, can you read me a bedtime story? It'll help me fall asleep on time...
3000.chime_23: It's 11 PM... The moonlight is warm and gentle tonight, just like you... Mmh... If I just close my eyes in your embrace, I should fall right asleep...
3000.chime_3: It's 3 AM... You've taking longer to... ponder things, it seems... You must be getting a little sleepy now, right? It's not too late to go to bed yet.
3000.chime_5: It's really... 5 AM? Mmgh... Sun's going to rise soon... Mmh... Guardian... Please go to bed...
3000.chime_6: It's 6 AM... *yawn*... You shouldn't be up so early, my guardian... And here I was hoping to be up earlier than you so I could wake you up... Zzz...
3000.chime_7: It's 7 AM... I've organized all the morning reports for you, so you can sleep another 10 minutes if you want. This is sadly the most I can do for you...
3000.chime_8: It's 8 AM... You're looking pretty sharp today, my guardian. Oh, you're going out already? W-wait! Don't forget your packed lunch!
3000.chime_9: It's 9 AM... Hmm. I started working and tried copying what you did, and I think I've suddenly figured out how it works!
3000.chuxi: Guardian, are you staying up late for the switch to the new year? In that case... I'm staying up, too! If I happen to, um, doze off, then please do wake me up!
3000.expedition: The commission team is back? Err... M-my stomach suddenly hurts, so please go greet them without me...
3000.genghuan: I-I changed my look! Phew... I can still hide behind my plushie... Thank goodness.
3000.head: tansuozhe32_3
3000.home: What's taking that person so long... Oh, you're back, my guardian! I was, um, w-waiting for you.
3000.huodong: There's a big crowd gathering outside. There must be an event coming soon... I think if you hold my hand tightly... I-I should be able to stomach going outside with you...
3000.login: Oh... Th-thank you for coming, my guardian. I thought this would be the perfect spot to relax and wait for you, so... Yes, I was waiting for you.
3000.mail: A new letter has arrived... If I'm to reply, I need to consider the opening and how to address the sender... Ugh, this is so hard...
3000.main: When I'm by your side, I feel at ease and safe! I-I wish it could always be like this...|I can't believe you have to deal with such troublesome paperwork every day while also communicating with all those people... (Do you really have the energy for all that?)|Y-you're going out? To a crowded place, at that? I, umm, think I'll stay here and file paperwork...
3000.mission: Unfinished work is like an endless stream of greetings... It's suffocating...
3000.mission_complete: I've finished all the work you entrusted to me. Heehee... Thank you for the praise, my guardian.
3000.name: Explorer
3000.qingrenjie: Guardia– I mean, Commander, I've made token chocolate for you! Please take it! ("Token" is just a figure of speech... There's no way my true feelings are lost on you, are they?)
3000.shengdan: The port is so sparkly and pretty, like a snow globe. Um... Guardian, I got a Christmas present for you! Thank you for taking such good care of me this past year!
3000.touch: I... I'm not trembling, not at all...
3000.wansheng: Trick or treat! Give me candy, or I'll... I'll stand here until you do... Thank you! Such cute wrapping... I'll treasure these!
3000.xinnian: Happy New Year, my guardian! I'm going to try really hard to learn, better myself, and make strides in life... Hm? Y-you think I'm achieving enough as it is without trying hard?
3000.zhongqiu: Tonight is sure to be a full moon... I think it'll be beautiful. Guardian, w-would you like to go see it with me? I'd love to share a quiet, happy moment with just you!

3100.expedition: Guardian, please go and receive the commission team... I, um... I need to go water some flowers, so you'll have to excuse me!
3100.head: tansuozhe31_1
3100.home: Welcome back, guardian... Welcome back, guardian... Welcome... Oh, err... I-I was just practicing my greetings.
3100.huodong: An event is happening soon? Wh-what does that mean? If it means we're going outside soon... I-I'm just going to pretend I never saw it!
3100.login: ...Oh, um! Guardian, uh, are you... Are you waiting for me to... say hello or something?
3100.mail: Mail is so convenient... You can learn new information without even going outside!
3100.main: Today... I read a book... sketched a design... wrote in my diary... I did a lot of things, really, but compared to the work you do... it was nothing noteworthy...|You look a bit troubled, guardian. Is it because of work? Oh, y-you're thinking about what to have for dinner? I-I was actually thinking the same.|The movie is about to start... Guardian, shall we go? There are two seats in the back... It'll be just us two...
3100.mission: I've finished compiling the missions into a list... It seems there's much we still need to do...
3100.mission_complete: You know... I'm actually quite decent at work you can do alone! (Pl-please praise me...)
3100.name: Explorer
3100.qingrenjie: Guardia– Err, I mean... Commander! I-it's Valentine's Day, and... Well, please take this chocolate! Can... Can we stay together at home this year?!
3100.shengdan: M-Merry Christmas, my guardian... I stayed up late to prepare a present for you, and I dozed off at some point... When I woke up, I was inside the gift box... Huh? Th-that counts as... a pleasant surprise?
3100.touch: Eep! Aahh... (If I just close my eyes, it should look like I'm dead...)
3100.wansheng: Can we just spend Halloween... at home, please? I'll try to make our place look really Halloween-y... (Heehee... Then I'll put on a stuffed animal costume... and spook the daylights out of you...)
3100.xinnian: H-happy New Year, my guardian! I made a new diary for you. It looks just like mine... I thought it'd be nice to record all the little moments we've shared together... Just imagining that makes me so happy.
3100.zhongqiu: Guardian, I... I made rabbit-shaped mooncakes. Please have one. Heehee... I learned a little trick from a rabbit: When scared, you can lie down on the spot... and you'll go unnoticed... C-cute? You really think so?

3200.chuxi: Guardian, today's a very special day, so why don't we drop all our work and spend New Year's Eve together? Yep-yep, that's your sole and most important duty, I say!
3200.expedition: Are you going out to receive the commission team, my guardian? Allow me to come with you♪
3200.head: tansuozhe32_1
3200.home: Welcome back, guardian! Did you have a smooth trip here? Did you spot anything amusing? Did you eat anything tasty? Also, did– *deep breath*... Should've paused to breathe...
3200.huodong: There's a special day just around the corner! Heehee – I hope to share many more special moments with you and make tons of memories! Because to me, no one is more special than you!
3200.login: You're here, guardian... Oh, right, I should call you Commander while at work! Commander, I'll make you proud today!
3200.mail: I've brought your mail! And not JUST mail, but also a rainbow cake, donuts, and honeyed waffles! I made them all myself. Hope you enjoy!
3200.main: You're my guardian, aren't you, Commander? Then I'd like you to be a good role model for me!|Oh, right... I've been wondering this for ages: Since you don't have a tail, what do you hug when you go to bed? Oh! I think I know! Heehee...|Ahaha! Every time we meet, my head just fills up with things I want to talk about! Why, you ask? Because I miss you, and I have so many things I want to tell you at once!
3200.mission: New missions have come in! Hm? Hey, don't frown! I'll give you a hand with them!
3200.mission_complete: Mission complete! I made your favorite coffee, so let's stop and take a break♪
3200.name: Explorer
3200.qingrenjie: Guardian, I'd like you to have my homemade chocolate! Also, I have an important favor to ask – could you clear your whole schedule today for me? There's an event at the amusement park that I want to check out with you♪
3200.shengdan: Merry Christmas, guardian! Now it's your turn to make a Christmas wish! ...What do I wish for? To spend next year's Christmas, and the one after that, and so on, together with you!
3200.touch: Heheh, ahahaha! That tickles! Whew... I'm doing flower arrangement. How do you feel about this sunflower?
3200.wansheng: Guardian, I baked a load of pumpkin-shaped cookies for us to hand out to people! But first... I'm going to pester you for a big, big hug!
3200.xinnian: Happy New Year, guardian! Thanks for always looking out for me and being there for me over the past year. This year, I'm going to work really hard so I can better support you. Heehee – I'll prove myself, don't you worry!
3200.zhongqiu: When you gaze at the moon with someone you love, the moon looks even rounder – according to Miss Lora, the outstanding secretary! Just so you know, you're only allowed to think about me and the moon tonight!

3300.chuxi: Guardian, I've made a New Year's feast for you. I've heard that if you share a meal with someone you love as the year changes, you'll never be apart for the coming year... and I always want to be with you!
3300.expedition: This bed is so nice and comfy... I don't think it'll let me get out to greet the commission team with you. Heehee...
3300.head: tansuozhe_2
3300.home: Oh! I was just thinking about messaging you, and now you come back to me... Is this what they call telepathy?
3300.huodong: You partake in events even when you're on holiday? V-very well. I'll get ready, then we'll set off!
3300.login: Gosh, look at the time... Guardian... Um, I mean, Commander, have you gotten used to the holiday rhythm yet? Well, then please stay snuggled in my arms a little longer.
3300.mail: Huh? Got a new email on my phone... Y-you want to rest? Oh, you want me to read it out to you? Umm... Okay. Ahem...
3300.main: Our holiday has only just begun. Is there anything you'd like to do, guardian? If nothing comes to mind, then would you like to... h-hold me in your arms and go back to sleep?|I might've snapped a picture of you while you were sleeping... Heehee. I've set it as my lock screen wallpaper♪|This holiday resort you picked out really has some stunning scenery. That said, my favorite thing is just lounging around in our hotel room, because I don't have to do anything else. Heehee...
3300.mission: You get urgent work even when you're on holiday? W-well, then allow me to assist!
3300.mission_complete: Have we finished all of our missions? Whew... I'm glad I could be of service. Now we'll have plenty of time to relax, won't we?
3300.name: Explorer
3300.qingrenjie: You've been staring at me for quite some time, guardian... Are you wondering where I've hid your chocolate? If you can't guess, then, um, you can come closer and search for it yourself...
3300.shengdan: Merry Christmas, my guardian. What do you say we decorate this holiday villa later? For instance, we could put some star-shaped ribbons here and– Ah! N-no, you can't put them on my body!
3300.touch: Why I'm not properly dressed? B-because... I'm wearing your shirt, guardian...
3300.wansheng: Wow, so much candy! Thank you so much! Heehee. Honestly, I don't need candy... Things are so sweet already just by having you... by my side...
3300.xinnian: Guardian... Um... Would you be interested in going to watch the New Year's fireworks with me? Please, please hold my hand tightly... When I close my eyes and make a wish... I'll wish that I could be in your embrace... (Yes! I said it!)
3300.zhongqiu: Nom, nom... Guardian, the flavor of this mooncake is incredible! W-would you like to have a bite? Okay, j-just one second, please... (This is like... an indirect kiss!)
